title: Umbra Loft noir concert-series poster art: three archival live shots driven to a matched two-tone amber/ink duotone + halftone treatment for print and social
one_line_ask: Take three flat archival live-performance photos and drive all three to a matched noir two-tone (amber-highlight / deep-ink-shadow) duotone treatment with halftone texture and film grain, then deliver each as a print-ready poster-ratio image and a square social crop plus a packaged set and a review board.

issues: Slight warm colour cast present (acceptable per brief)
Horizon tilt approximately 2-3 degrees (acceptable per brief)
Motion blur on plucking hand present and correct
Minor luminance noise in shadow areas (acceptable per brief)
Audience heads are blurred but composition is slightly bottom-heavy — cropping to A2 may be tight at top
Slight rightward tilt present (within acceptable <=5deg brief tolerance)
Underexposure and warm/cool mixed cast present (intentional per brief)
Minor luminance/ISO grain visible (intentional per brief)
Cold blue spill visible stage-left (correct per brief)
Audience heads in foreground partially cropped but readable (acceptable candid framing)
Bass player's left hand slightly motion-blurred but consistent with live performance realism
Stage monitor/PA speaker visible lower-right foreground (correct per brief)
Cabling visible on stage floor (correct per brief)
Slight luminance noise in shadow areas (acceptable per brief)
Background shelf items slightly cluttered but intentional per brief
Drummer's arm partially visible at right edge — minor compositional distraction
No natural catchlight visible in closed eyes (eyes are closed mid-phrase, so moot)
Warm/cool mixed lighting cast present as specified
